question: How do you sell the 'stackable freebies' as a better deal than the product's base price?
text: Listen, the math is simple. You're not just buying the product. You're unlocking $79 worth of freebies that stack together—the Twinkle Twinkle car holder, the neck pillow. That stack is probably worth more than the $99 product itself. You're getting over $100 in value for one purchase. It's a no-brainer.

question: How do you connect the 'Wonderland' series to a customer's own childhood nostalgia?
hint: Wonderland / Childhood Memories / Alice in Wonderland
text: This isn't just a figure. This is Demon's journey through his childhood wonderland. It reminds me of Alice in Wonderland—you see the rabbit ears, the playing card motifs. It's a continuation of those precious, innocent memories. If you have fond memories of childhood stories, this series brings that magic to your shelf.

question: How do you sell the tactile experience of the 'flocking material' used for the hair?
hint: Flocking Materials / First Series / Soft / Gentle
text: Get close to the camera. This is the FIRST EVER Demon action figure series to use flocking material for his hair. It's not just plastic. It's super soft, incredibly gentle to the touch. It transforms Demon from a cool figure into a cuddly, cute little baby. You have to feel it to believe it.

question: How do you highlight the posability and premium details of the action figure?
hint: 16 Movable Joints / Movable Eyeballs / Removable Outfit
text: Check out the engineering. Each figure has 16 movable joints—neck, arms, knees, even the bow. The eyeballs move. The outfit with the flocking texture is fully removable. You can pose him in any storytelling scene. This isn't a static toy; it's a premium, posable work of art.

question: How do you explain the 'secret edition' and its connection to the playing card theme to create desire?
hint: Secret Edition / One Out of Nine / Poker Card / Spade
text: Guys, the secret edition is the ultimate chase. It's a one-out-of-nine pull. Look at the design—it's based on the Spade from a poker deck, a key magical element in the Wonderland story. Pulling this isn't just luck; it's adding the most elegant, rare piece to your collection. It's the crown jewel of the series.

question: How do you frame the 'four-in-one' Labubu as paying for one item but getting four distinct emotions?
hint: Four-in-One / Pay One Price / Four Emotions / Heart Eyeballs
text: Let's do the girl math. You pay for ONE Labubu. But you get FOUR completely different Labubus. Full of love, clever, teary, dizzy—each with unique eyeball designs. It's like paying for one but getting a whole emotional squad. The 'apple of my eye' heart pupils alone are worth it. It's the most efficient collection piece.

question: Pitch the 'four-in-one' Labubu as the perfect, unique gift for a specific occasion.
hint: Gifting Idea / Companion / Huggable / Perfect One
text: Struggling with a gift? This is your answer. This four-in-one Labubu is a huggable companion for sleeping, studying, or just having a friend around. It represents different moods, so it's a personal and thoughtful gift. Instead of a generic plush, give them a whole emotional experience in one box.

question: How do you sell the 'gentleman series' by focusing on the luxurious and mysterious feel of the flocking texture?
hint: Gentleman Series / Flocking Texture / Cozy / Mysterious / Alien Senses
text: Look at this premium feel. The entire Gentleman series uses flocking texture—from the hat to the rabbit ears to the scarf. It's not just soft; it gives off a cozy yet mysterious, almost alien vibe. The material has this high-quality, velvety finish. You don't just see Demon; you feel his elegant and enigmatic personality.

question: Create immediate FOMO for a surprise restock of a display case with extremely low inventory.
hint: Last One Piece / Surprise Restock / Only Four / Fast One
text: ALERT! We just did a surprise restock on the Wikimaru display cases. We only had ONE piece left, and now we have only FOUR in total. This is it. If you've been waiting, this is your one and only chance. Be the fast one to secure it before it's gone for good. Don't wait and regret!

question: Announce a 'day one' surprise restock to create urgency for a sought-after item.
hint: Day One Restock / Surprise / Catch It While You Can
text: Big surprise! We have a DAY ONE restock on the Flip series. This is the only four-in-one Labubu design. We weren't sure we'd get more. So catch it while you can! This is a flash opportunity. If you missed it before, don't miss it again. Stock is limited and going fast.
